text:
that are necessary to review the financial status of the patient, 
arrange for meal service and delivery of medications to the home, and arrange for the 
Medicaid State agency to assist the patient with the application for Medicaid are covered. 
The services related to the assistance in filing the application for Medicaid and the 
follow-up on the application are not covered since they must be provided by the State 
agency free of charge, and hence the patient has no obligation to pay for such
